Class-Ranger 20 — Male Human Ranger: 20
Strength: 13 (+1) Dexterity: 13 (+1) Constitution: 18 (+4) Intelligence: 13 (+1) Wisdom: 16 (+3) Charisma: 15 (+2)
Background: Acolyte Alignment: Chaotic Good Deity: Egyptian-Nephthys (CG)
Experience: 448810/1000000 Level: 20 Size: Medium Speed: 35 Carry/Lift: 195/390
Ability Notes:
Human Ability Adjustment: +1 Charisma/+1 Constitution/+1 Dexterity/+1 Intelligence/+1 Strength/+1 Wisdom
Roving: +5 Speed
Land's Stride: Can move normally through nonmagical difficult terrain and plants
Otherworldly Glamour: +3 Charisma checks
Roving: Has a 35' climb Speed and a 35' swim Speed
Writhing Tide: Can use a bonus action to gain a 10' fly Speed for 1 min 6 times per long rest
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +6
Feat Count: General: 5 Selectable Feature Count: Ranger (Fighting Style); Ranger (Ranger Archetype)
Feats: Alert; Dungeon Delver; Healer; Magic Initiate (Wizard); Savage Attacker Human Features: Human Ability Adjustment; Language (Common; Choose 1 from any) Ranger Features: Armor Proficiency (Light; Medium; Shield); Beguiling Twist; Canny; Deft Explorer; Dreadful Strikes; Extra Attack; Favored Foe; Feral Senses; Fey Reinforcements; Fey Wanderer Magic; Fey Wanderer; Fighting Style (Blind Fighting); Fighting Style (Druidic Warrior); Fighting Style (Thrown Weapon Fighting); Fighting Style; Foe Slayer; Gathered Swarm; Land's Stride; Martial Versatility; Mighty Swarm; Misty Wanderer; Nature's Veil; Otherworldly Glamour; Primal Awareness; Ranger Archetype; Roving; Save Proficiency (Strength; Dexterity); Skill Proficiency (Choose 3 from Animal Handling, Athletics, Insight, Investigation, Nature, Perception, Stealth, Survival); Spellcasting Focus; Spellcasting; Swarming Dispersal; Swarmkeeper Magic; Swarmkeeper; Tireless; Vanish; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Martial Weapons); Writhing Tide Acolyte Features: Language (Choose 2 from any); Shelter Of The Faithful; Skill Proficiency (Insight; Religion)
Feature Notes:
Deft Explorer: Has the Canny, Roving, and Tireless features
Fighting Style: 1 selection
Ranger Archetype: 1 selection
Fey Wanderer Magic: Fey association shows a minor physical effect
Shelter Of The Faithful: Can receive aid from temples of Egyptian-Nephthys and fellow believers
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +1 Insight: (wis) +9 Performance: (cha) +2
Animal Handling: (wis) +3 Intimidation: (cha) +2 Persuasion: (cha) +2
Arcana: (int) +1 Investigation: (int) +1 Religion: (int) +7
Athletics: (str) +7 Medicine: (wis) +3 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +1
Deception: (cha) +2 Nature: (int) +1 Stealth: (dex) +7
History: (int) +7 Perception: (wis) +9 Survival: (wis) +3
Skill Proficiency: Athletics; History; Insight; Perception; Religion; Stealth
Languages: Abyssal; Celestial; Common; Infernal; Orc; Sylvan
Skill Notes:
Canny: Language (Choose 2 from any)
Otherworldly Glamour: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from Deception, Performance, Persuasion)
Canny: +6 on a chosen proficient skill
Dungeon Delver: Has advantage on Perception and Investigation to detect secret doors/Suffers no Perception penalty when traveling at a fast pace
Feral Senses: R30' Can locate invisible creatures
Fighting Style (Blind Fighting): Has 10' Blindsight
Healer: Using a healer's kit to stabilize also restores 1 hit point/Can expend a use of a healer's kit to restore 1d6+4 + target HD hit points once per creature per short rest
Vanish: Can hide as a bonus action and can be tracked only via magic
Combat
Hit Points: 161 Initiative: +6 Armor Class: 13
Armor Proficiency: Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Martial Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: Studded Leather Shield: None Weapons: Greataxe (+7 1d12+1 S); Mace (+7 1d6+1 B); Shortsword (+7 1d6+1 P); Unarmed Strike (+7 1+1 B)
Combat Notes:
Alert: +5 Initiative
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +80
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +1
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +1
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +1
Mighty Swarm: Has increased Gathered Swarm effects
Strength Attack Adjustment: +1
Strength Damage Adjustment: +1
Alert: Cannot be surprised, and unseen foes gain no advantage on attacks on self
Beguiling Twist: R120' Can use a reaction in response to a successful save vs. charmed or frightened to inflict a choice of charmed or frightened on a different target for 1 min (save DC 17 Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end)
Dreadful Strikes: Can inflict +1d6 HP psychic with a weapon once per turn
Extra Attack: Can make 2 attacks during an Attack action
Favored Foe: Can mark a target with a successful attack for concentration up to 1 min 6 times per long rest; the first hit each turn on a marked foe inflicts +1d8 HP weapon damage
Feral Senses: Suffers no disadvantage when attacking an invisible foe
Fighting Style (Thrown Weapon Fighting): Can draw a thrown weapon as part of an attack, and thrown weapons inflict +2 HP
Foe Slayer: Can gain a choice of +3 attack or damage vs. a favored enemy once per turn
Gathered Swarm: Once per turn, a successful attack allows moving self 5' and gaining half cover until the start of the next turn, moving the target 15' and knocking it prone (save DC 17 Strength negates), or inflicting +1d8 HP piercing
Martial Versatility: Can replace a Fighting Style when boosting an ability or taking a feat
Savage Attacker: Can take the better of 2 melee damage rolls once per turn
Swarming Dispersal: Can use a reaction when hit to gain resistance to the damage and teleport 30' 6 times per long rest
Tireless: Can gain 1d8+3 temporary hit points 6 times per long rest, and a short rest reduces exhaustion by 1
Save Proficiency: Dexterity; Strength
Save: Charisma: +2; Constitution: +4; Dexterity: +7; Intelligence: +1; Strength: +7; Wisdom: +3
Save Notes:
Beguiling Twist: Has advantage vs. charmed and frightened
Dungeon Delver: Has advantage to avoid or resist traps and resistance to trap damage
Land's Stride: Has advantage vs. impeding plants
Magic
Spells Known/Prepared: D0: 2; R: 11; W0: 2; W: 1 Spell Slots: R1: 4; R2: 3; R3: 3; R4: 3; R5: 2 Attack: D: +9; R: +9; W: +7 Spell DC: D: 17; R: 17; W: 15
Spells:
Arcane Eye (R4 [Swarmkeeper Magic] Divi): (Action) R30' Self sees with Darkvision through a remote invisible eye that can move 30' per rd for concentration up to 1 hr
Beast Sense (R2 [Primal Awareness] Divi): (Action) Self can perceive through a touched willing beast's senses for concentration up to 1 hr [R]
Charm Person (R1 [Fey Wanderer Magic] Ench): (Action) R30' Target humanoid becomes charmed by self (save Wisdom negates; active fighting gives advantage) for 1 hr or until harmed (+Level affects +1 target)
Chill Touch (W0 Necr): (Action) R120' Ranged spell inflicts 4d8 HP necrotic, and the target cannot regain hit points until the start of the next turn; undead also suffer disadvantage vs. self attack for 1 rd
Commune With Nature (R5 [Primal Awareness] Divi): (Minute) Reveals 3 facts about nature within 3 miles, or within 300' when underground [R]
Conjure Woodland Beings (R4 Conj): (Action) R60' Summons a choice of 1, 2, 4, or 8 obedient CR 2, 1, 1/2, or 1/4 fey creatures for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level doubles or triples the number of creatures at level 6 or 8)
Cordon Of Arrows (R2 Tran): (Action) Four planted arrows or bolts attack non-designated creatures within 30', inflicting 1d6 HP piercing each (save Dexterity negates), for 8 hr (+Level affects +2 pieces)
Dimension Door (R4 [Fey Wanderer Magic] Conj): (Action) Teleports self and 1 adjacent willing creature up to 500'
Dispel Magic (R3 [Fey Wanderer Magic] Abju): (Action) R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell (+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level)
Dominate Beast (R4 Ench): (Action) R60' Target beast obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; active fighting gives advantage, and damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level extends the duration to 10 min, 1 hr, or 8 hr at level 5, 6, or 7)
Ensnaring Strike (R1 Conj): (Bonus) Next successful self weapon attack within concentration up to 1 min restrains the foe and inflicts 1d6 HP piercing each rd until the spell ends (save Strength negates; Large creatures have advantage on the save, and additional saves each rd end) (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Entangle (R1 Conj): (Action) R90' 20' sq inflicts difficult terrain and restrains creatures (save Strength negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Faerie Fire (R1 [Swarmkeeper Magic] Evoc): (Action) R60' Objects and creatures in a 20' cube glow (save Dexterity negates), giving their foes advantage on attacks, for concentration up to 1 min
Fog Cloud (R1 Conj): (Action) R120' 20' radius becomes heavily obscured for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the radius by 20')
Gaseous Form (R3 [Swarmkeeper Magic] Tran): (Action) Touched willing creature becomes gaseous, gaining a 10' fly Speed, resistance to nonmagical damage, and advantage on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution saves, for concentration up to 1 hr
Greater Restoration (R5 Abju): (Action) Touched recovers from an effect causing an exhaustion level, a charmed or petrified condition, a curse, an ability reduction, or a reduction of hit point maximum
Insect Plague (R5 [Swarmkeeper Magic] Conj): (Action) R300' 20' radius inflicts 4d10 HP piercing (save Constitution half) for concentration up to 10 min (+Level inflicts +1d10 HP)
Locate Animals Or Plants (R2 Divi): (Action) Reveals the location within 5 miles of a specified kind of beast or plant [R]
Locate Creature (R4 [Primal Awareness] Divi): (Action) Reveals the location of a specified creature or species within 1000' for concentration up to 1 hr; running water blocks the spell
Longstrider (R1 Tran): (Action) Touched gains +10' Speed for 1 hr (+Level affects +1 target)
Mage Armor (W1 Abju): (Action) Willing, unarmored touched gains Armor Class 13 + Dexterity modifier for 8 hr; the spell ends if the target dons armor
Mage Hand (R0 [Swarmkeeper Magic] Conj): (Action) R30' Spectral hand performs minor tasks, moving up to 10 lb, for 1 min
Meld Into Stone (R3 Tran): (Action) Self steps into rock, losing sight and suffering disadvantage on hearing Perception but allowing casting spells on self, for up to 8 hr; significant partial destruction of the stone inflicts 6d6 HP bludgeoning, expulsion, and prone on self, and complete destruction increases the damage to 50 HP [R]
Mislead (R5 [Fey Wanderer Magic] Illu): (Action) Makes self invisible and creates an illusory duplicate that can move 70' and share senses for concentration up to 1 hr; attacking or casting ends the invisibility
Misty Step (R2 [Fey Wanderer Magic] Conj): (Bonus) Teleports self 30'
Misty Step (R2 [Misty Wanderer] Conj): (Bonus) Teleports self 30'
Plant Growth (R3 Tran): (Action) R150' Causes plants in a 100' radius to overgrow, slowing movement to 1/4 Speed, or enriches a half-mile radius for 1 year
Ray Of Frost (W0 Evoc): (Action) R60' Ranged spell inflicts 4d8 HP cold and -10' Speed until the start of the next turn
Revivify (R3 Necr): (Action) Restores life and 1 hit point to a touched 1-min-old corpse
Shillelagh (D0 Tran): (Bonus) Held club gains +9 magical attacks that inflict 1d8+3 HP for 1 min
Speak With Animals (R1 [Primal Awareness] Divi): (Action) Self can talk with beasts for 10 min [R]
Speak With Plants (R3 [Primal Awareness] Tran): (Action) Self can talk with and command plants in a 30' radius, turning difficult terrain from plant growth into normal terrain or vice versa, for 10 min
Stoneskin (R4 Abju): (Action) Touched gains resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing for concentration up to 1 hr
Summon Beast (R2 Conj): (Action) R90' Summons an obedient bestial spirit (Armor Class 13; 60' darkvision; multiattack equal to half the spell level; inflicts 1d8+6 piercing) of air (20 hit points; fly 60'; does not provoke opportunity attacks when flying out of reach), land (30 hit points; move and climb 30'; has advantage on attacks when within 5' of an ally), or water (30 hit points; swim 30'; water-breathing; has advantage on attacks when within 5' of an ally) for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 5, and attack damage by 1)
Summon Fey (R3 [Fey Reinforcements] Conj): (Action) R90' Summons an obedient fey spirit (Armor Class 15; 30 hit points; move 40' and can teleport 30'; 60' darkvision; multiattack equal to half the spell level; short sword inflicts 1d6+6 HP piercing plus 1d6 HP force), of type fuming (has advantage on the next attack in the same turn after teleporting), mirthful (can charm 1 creature (save Wisdom negates) within 10' after teleporting for 1 min or until damaged), or tricksy (can create a 5' cube of darkness within 5' after teleporting until the end of its next turn) for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, and piercing damage by 1)
Thorn Whip (D0 Tran): (Action) R30' Melee spell attack inflicts 4d6 HP piercing and pulls a Large or smaller target 10'
Tree Stride (R5 Conj): (Action) Allows self to use 10' of movement to step into and out of a pair of similar trees within 500' once per turn for concentration up to 1 min
Web (R2 [Swarmkeeper Magic] Conj): (Action) R60' 20' cube inflicts difficult terrain and restrains creatures (save Dexterity negates; Strength frees) for concentration up to 1 hr; burning the web inflicts 2d4 HP fire
Magic Notes:
Fighting Style (Druidic Warrior): Knows 2 D0 cantrips
Fey Reinforcements: Can cast Summon Fey without expending a spell slot, optionally for 1 min instead of for concentration, once per long rest
Fighting Style (Druidic Warrior): Can replace a D0 cantrip when gaining a level
Magic Initiate (Wizard): Knows 2 Wizard cantrips and can cast a chosen W1 spell without expending a spell slot once per long rest
Misty Wanderer: Can cast Misty Step without expending a spell slot 3 times per long rest, and Misty Step can take along a willing adjacent creature
Nature's Veil: Can use a bonus action to become invisible until the start of the next turn 6 times per long rest
Primal Awareness: Can cast Commune With Nature, Locate Creature, Speak With Plants, Beast Sense, and Speak With Animals without expending a spell slot once each per long rest
Spellcasting Focus: Can use a druidic focus for ranger spells
Spellcasting: Can cast spells from the ranger spell list; regains expended spell slots after a long rest
Notes
Validation Errors: Selectable Feature Allocation: 2 available vs. 5 allocated
